Title: Authorize.Net - Complete Payment Flow
Preconditions:
- Logged in as registered user
- Cart has at least one item
- Authorize.Net payment processor configured and active
- Authorize.Net test credentials set in environment
Test_Data: FRONT_URL={{FRONT_URL}}, USER_EMAIL={{USER_EMAIL}}, USER_PASSWORD={{USER_PASSWORD}}, TEST_CARD_NUMBER={{TEST_CARD_NUMBER}}, TEST_CARD_EXP={{TEST_CARD_EXP}}, TEST_CARD_CVV={{TEST_CARD_CVV}}
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[ACT] Select Authorize.Net as payment method if not pre-selected
[ACT] Click 'Place Order' — this redirects to the Authorize.Net payment form at {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment
[WAIT] Wait for {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment to load with Authorize.Net payment form
[ACT] Fill 'Card Number' with '{{TEST_CARD_NUMBER}}'
[ACT] Fill 'Expiry Date' with '{{TEST_CARD_EXP}}'
[ACT] Fill 'CVV' with '{{TEST_CARD_CVV}}'
[ACT] Fill 'Cardholder Name' with a test name
[ACT] Click 'Place Order' or 'Submit Payment'
[WAIT] Wait for payment authorization response
Assertions:
[NAV] After clicking 'Place Order' from cart user is redirected to {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment
[DOM] Payment form renders correctly on /checkout/payment page
[NAV] After successful payment user navigated to order confirmation page
[STATE] Order confirmation displays order number
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart GraphQL mutation errors[] is empty
[ADMIN] Order appears in admin with Authorize.Net payment method recorded
[NETWORK] Payment request sent to Authorize.Net endpoint; no raw card data in storefront API requests
Failure_Signals: No redirect to /checkout/payment after clicking Place Order from cart; payment form does not load; order confirmation not reached; mutation returns errors[]

Title: Authorize.Net - Invalid Card Number Validation
Preconditions:
- Logged in as registered user
- Cart has at least one item
- Authorize.Net payment form loaded at {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment (reached by clicking Place Order from cart)
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; click 'Place Order' to reach Authorize.Net payment form at {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment
[WAIT] Wait for payment form to load
[ACT] Fill 'Card Number' with '@td(CYBERSOURCE_INVALID.number)' (fails Luhn check)
[ACT] Fill 'Expiry Date' with a valid future date; fill 'CVV' with a valid 3-digit value
[ACT] Attempt to submit payment
[ASSERT] Validation error appears on 'Card Number' field
[ASSERT] Form does not submit with invalid card number
Assertions:
[DOM] 'Card Number' field shows validation error indicating invalid card
[STATE] Payment submission blocked for Luhn-failing card number
[NAV] User remains on {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] No createOrderFromCart GraphQL mutation fired or mutation returns errors[]
[CONSOLE] No unhandled JS exceptions
Failure_Signals: Invalid card number accepted without error; form submits and reaches payment processor with known-bad card; user navigated away from /checkout/payment unexpectedly

Title: Authorize.Net - Empty Fields Validation
Preconditions:
- Logged in as registered user
- Cart has at least one item
- Authorize.Net payment form loaded at {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment
Steps:

Title: Authorize.Net - Order Visible in Admin with Payment Details
Preconditions:
- Authorize.Net payment completed (PAY-AN-001 passed or equivalent)
- Admin login credentials available

[NAV] Open {{ADMIN_URL}} in a separate browser context; log in with {{ADMIN_EMAIL}} / {{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}
[NAV] Navigate to Orders section; search for the order by order number
[ACT] Open the order detail view
[ASSERT] Order is found in admin
[ASSERT] Payment method field shows 'Authorize.Net' or equivalent label
[ASSERT] Transaction ID is recorded in payment section

[DOM] Payment method displayed as Authorize.Net
[DOM] Transaction ID field populated in payment details

[API] createOrderFromCart GraphQL mutation errors[] was empty at time of order creation

Title: Datatrans - Invalid OTP Recovery
Preconditions:
- Logged in as registered user
- Cart has at least one item
- Datatrans OTP prompt currently displayed (preceded by card entry step)
Steps:
[KEY] This test begins at the Datatrans OTP prompt — reach this state by completing card entry in Datatrans form (see PAY-DT-002 for navigation)
[ACT] At OTP input: fill OTP field with '000000' (intentionally incorrect)
[ACT] Submit the incorrect OTP
[WAIT] Wait for Datatrans error response
[ASSERT] Error message displayed indicating invalid OTP
[ASSERT] Retry mechanism available — OTP field still accessible or re-prompted
[ACT] Fill OTP field with the correct value from DATATRANCE_OTP environment variable
[ACT] Submit the correct OTP
[WAIT] Wait for return redirect to storefront
[ASSERT] Payment succeeds; user reaches order confirmation
Assertions:
[DOM] Error message shown after incorrect OTP submission
[STATE] Retry mechanism available after invalid OTP (field not permanently locked)
[NAV] Correct OTP leads to successful return to storefront
[STATE] Only one order created — no duplicate from the failed first OTP attempt
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart GraphQL mutation errors[] is empty on final successful submission
[ADMIN] Single order in admin — no duplicate orders from retry scenario
Failure_Signals: No error shown for incorrect OTP; OTP field locked without retry option; duplicate orders created from retry; correct OTP rejected after previous incorrect attempt

Title: Skyflow - Real-time Card Type Detection
Preconditions:
- Logged in as registered user
- Cart has at least one item
- Skyflow payment form loaded at {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; click 'Place Order'; wait for Skyflow form at {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment
[ACT] Click into 'Card Number' field; type '4' (Visa BIN prefix)
[ASSERT] Visa icon becomes active/highlighted in card type indicator area; other icons dimmed

Title: Saved Card - Returning User Pays Without Re-entering Card Details
Preconditions:
- Logged in as registered user who has previously completed a successful CyberSource payment
- A saved/tokenized card exists in the user's account (from prior payment)
- Cart has at least one item
- CyberSource payment processor configured and active
Steps:
[NAV] Log in as {{RETURNING_USER_EMAIL}} / {{RETURNING_USER_PASSWORD}} — a user with a previously saved card
[ACT] Add at least one item to cart
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] Wait for CyberSource payment section to render
[ASSERT] Previously saved card is displayed in the payment section — e.g., 'Visa ending in XXXX' or equivalent masked card reference
[ACT] Select the saved card option (if not pre-selected)
[ASSERT] Card number, expiry, and CVV fields are NOT fully displayed or editable — only masked card info shown
[ACT] Enter CVV only if prompted (some processors require CVV re-entry for saved cards)
[ACT] Click 'Place Order'
[WAIT] Wait for order processing response
[ASSERT] Order confirmation page displayed — payment succeeded using saved card
Assertions:
[DOM] Saved card displayed in payment section with masked card number (e.g., '•••• •••• •••• 3705')
[STATE] Full card number and expiry fields not re-shown or editable when saved card selected
[NAV] Order confirmation reached after clicking 'Place Order' with saved card
[DOM] Order confirmation shows order number
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart GraphQL mutation response has no errors[] entries
[NETWORK] Network request uses stored token — raw card PAN (@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.number)) absent from all payloads
[ADMIN] Order in admin shows payment method as stored card / tokenized reference
Failure_Signals: Saved card not shown after prior successful payment; user forced to re-enter full card details; raw card number visible in network payload for saved-card payment; order fails when using saved card but succeeds when entering card manually
Cleanup: Cancel order via admin if created

Title: Payment Method Switch - Form Resets When Switching Processors
Preconditions:
- Logged in as registered user
- Cart has at least one item
- At least two payment processors enabled (e.g., CyberSource and another method such as Skyflow or manual/PO)
- CyberSource payment form visible on {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; confirm at least two payment method options are visible
[ACT] Select 'Bank card (CyberSource)' payment method
[WAIT] Wait for CyberSource Flex Microform iframe fields to render
[ACT] Fill 'Card Number' with '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.number)'; fill 'Cardholder Name' with '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.cardholder)'; fill 'Expiry Date' with '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.expiry)'; fill 'CVV' with '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.cvv)'
[ASSERT] All four CyberSource fields contain entered data
[ACT] Switch to a different payment method (e.g., select 'Purchase Order' or another available option)
[WAIT] Wait for the payment form area to update
[ASSERT] CyberSource form fields are hidden or cleared — previously entered card data is not persisted in DOM
[ACT] Switch back to 'Bank card (CyberSource)'
[WAIT] Wait for CyberSource form to re-render
[ASSERT] Card fields are empty — no previously entered values retained after switching away and back
Assertions:
[DOM] CyberSource payment fields cleared / iframes re-initialized after switching away and returning
[STATE] No stale card data persisted in any input field after payment method switch
[STATE] The alternative payment method form renders correctly when its option is selected
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] No JS errors from CyberSource Flex Microform during form reset and re-initialization
[NETWORK] No payment tokenization request fired when switching payment methods (only on Place Order)
Failure_Signals: Previously entered card data still present in iframe fields after switching away (data leak); switching causes JS error breaking payment form; switching back to CyberSource shows empty form but Place Order fires with stale token

Title: Manual Payment - Purchase Order Placed with Pending Payment Status
Preconditions:
- Logged in as registered B2B user (organization member with PO payment permission)
- Cart has at least one item
- 'Purchase Order' or 'Wire Transfer' (manual/offline) payment method enabled in store settings
- Admin access available to verify order status
Test_Data: FRONT_URL={{FRONT_URL}}, BACK_URL={{BACK_URL}}, USER_EMAIL={{B2B_USER_EMAIL}}, USER_PASSWORD={{B2B_USER_PASSWORD}}, ADMIN_EMAIL={{ADMIN_EMAIL}}, ADMIN_PASSWORD={{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}, PO_NUMBER=PO-TEST-{{TIMESTAMP}}
Steps:
[NAV] Log in as {{B2B_USER_EMAIL}} / {{B2B_USER_PASSWORD}}; add at least one item to cart
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] Wait for payment methods to render
[ACT] Select 'Purchase Order' or 'Wire Transfer' (manual/offline payment method)
[ASSERT] PO reference number field appears (if applicable) — fill with PO_NUMBER
[ASSERT] No card number, CVV, or expiry date fields are shown for manual payment
[ACT] Click 'Place Order'
[WAIT] Wait for order confirmation response
[ASSERT] Order confirmation page displayed with order number
[ASSERT] Payment status on confirmation indicates 'Pending Payment' or equivalent (not 'Paid')
[NAV] Log in to {{BACK_URL}} admin with {{ADMIN_EMAIL}} / {{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}; locate the order in Orders list
[ASSERT] Order in admin shows payment status as 'Pending' or 'Awaiting Payment'
[ASSERT] Order status allows fulfilment workflow to proceed (not blocked at payment)
Assertions:
[DOM] Manual payment option selectable without triggering card input fields
[NAV] Order confirmation page reached after selecting manual payment and clicking 'Place Order'
[DOM] Order confirmation indicates pending/offline payment status — not shown as 'Paid'
[ADMIN] Order in admin with payment status 'Pending' or 'New' (not 'Paid')
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart GraphQL mutation errors[] is empty for manual payment flow
[ADMIN] Order payment method recorded as Purchase Order / Wire Transfer in admin order details
Failure_Signals: Manual payment option not shown to B2B user; form incorrectly shows card input fields for manual payment; order placed but shows 'Paid' status immediately (BL-PAY-003 violation); order not visible in admin after placement

Title: Skyflow Tokenization - Raw Card PAN Absent from All Network Requests
Preconditions:
- Logged in as registered user
- Cart has at least one item
- Skyflow payment processor configured
- Browser DevTools Network tab open and recording ALL requests (including XHR/Fetch)
- Test card number known for verification: @td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.number)
Steps:
[NAV] Navigate to {{FRONT_URL}}/cart; select Skyflow payment method; open DevTools Network tab and start recording
[ACT] Click 'Place Order' — this redirects to {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment with Skyflow form
[WAIT] Wait for Skyflow payment form to load at {{FRONT_URL}}/checkout/payment
[ACT] Fill Skyflow 'Card Number' iframe field with '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.number)'; fill 'Expiry Date' with '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.expiry)'; fill 'CVV' with '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.cvv)'
[ACT] Submit payment via Skyflow form
[WAIT] Wait for order processing to complete
[ACT] In DevTools Network tab: filter requests by XHR/Fetch; search all request payloads for the string '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.number)'
[ASSERT] Raw card number '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.number)' is NOT present in any request payload, URL parameter, or response body
[ACT] Locate the Skyflow tokenization request in Network tab; inspect the token value sent to the Virto Commerce backend
[ASSERT] Token format is a UUID or alphanumeric reference — NOT the raw card PAN
[ASSERT] Order confirmation page reached after successful Skyflow payment
Assertions:
[NETWORK] String '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.number)' absent from all captured network request payloads and URLs
[NETWORK] Skyflow token (UUID or alphanumeric) present in the request sent to Virto Commerce backend instead of raw PAN
[NAV] Order confirmation reached — tokenization did not block payment flow
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] createOrderFromCart GraphQL mutation errors[] is empty
[ADMIN] Order in admin shows Skyflow token or masked card reference — not raw PAN
Failure_Signals: Raw card number '@td(CYBERSOURCE_VISA.number)' found in any network request payload (BL-PAY-001 / BL-PAY-002 violation); Skyflow token not present in backend request; tokenization request fails causing order to not complete; token format is full PAN rather than opaque reference

Title: After Decline User Can Switch Payment Method Entirely
Preconditions: User logged in; at checkout; multiple payment methods available; first attempt declined
Steps:
[NAV] complete checkout to payment step
[ACT] select first payment method (e.g., CyberSource)
[ACT] enter declined card details and attempt payment
[WAIT] wait for decline error
[ASSERT] verify decline error shown
[ACT] select a different payment method (e.g., Authorize.Net or manual payment)
[ASSERT] verify payment form changes to the new method
[ASSERT] verify cart and shipping still intact after method switch
[ACT] complete payment with the alternative method
[ASSERT] verify order confirmation reached
Assertions:
[DOM] payment method selector still functional after decline
[DOM] new payment form rendered for alternative method
[STATE] checkout state preserved during method switch
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] new payment method used in final order creation
[CONSOLE] no JS errors during method switch
[NETWORK] no 5xx
Failure_Signals: payment method selector locked after decline; cannot switch methods; previous method form persists; checkout state lost during switch
